name: Washable Criss Cross Easy Care Rug - Threshold™
description:
Keep your home clean with the Crisscross Easy-Care Rug from Threshold™. Featuring diamond-shaped crisscross patterning across the surface, this rectangular accent rug helps protect your floor from dirt and grime, and the medium-pile construction offers ample cushioning underfoot. While the neutral color scheme of gray and ivory blends well with most decor, the latex backing helps provide sure, secure footing. Place it in your entryway or just outside your door to help keep dirt and water from being tracked into your home, or use it in the kitchen or laundry to make your cooking or washing experience more comfortable.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
